signals.headline: Kevin Warsh Nominated as Next Fed Chair by President Trump, Signaling Potential 2026 Rate Cuts Amid Stable Inflation Out
signals.raw:
Kevin Warsh Nominated as Next Fed Chair by President Trump, Signaling Potential 2026 Rate Cuts Amid Stable Inflation Outlook** | **YES** | **HIGH** confidence

signals.headline: Solana Teases XRP Integration | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Solana Teases XRP Integration | NO | HIGH confidence**  
No formal confirmation, announcement, or resolution of a Solana-XRP partnership exists; a cryptic Solana X post on April 15-16, 2026, sparked speculation and minor price gains (XRP +2.4% to $1.39, SOL up amid market rally), but lacks official partnership details from either project[1][7].

SEC CLARITY Act Roundtable Looms | NO | MED confidence**

signals.headline: Iran Ceasefire Boosts Market | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Iran Ceasefire Boosts Market | NO | HIGH confidence**  
U.S.-Iran ceasefire signals drove a broad rally (BTC >$75K, ETH +8.6% to $2,377, XRP +4.2% to $1.38, SOL +6.3% to $86.55), tied to ETF inflows (XRP $119.6M, SOL $34.9M), but this is general sentiment relief without asset-specific confirmations[4][6].
